Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Ostrom's 8 Principles Compliance

As a regenerative community member — The rule verifies that commons governance operations follow Ostrom's 8 principles for successful self-governance at any scale.
@regen-tribes @ostrom-principles @governance
Scenario Boundary rules — clear membership
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givena community commons resource
Thenthe boundaries of the resource must be clearly defined
Andthe individuals with rights to withdraw from the resource must be clearly defined
Scenario Congruence — local conditions
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenallocation and appropriation rules
Thenrules should be adapted to local conditions
Andthe costs of rules should be borne by the appropriators
Scenario Collective-choice arrangements — participation
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenmost affected by the commons
Thenthey should be included in collective-choice arrangements
Andrules can be modified by most affected participants
Scenario Monitoring — accountability
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenmonitors who are accountable to the appropriators
Thenthe monitors should be accountable to the appropriators
Andif they are not directly accountable, they should be the appropriators themselves
Scenario Graduated sanctions — proportional response
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenrule violations by appropriators
Thensanctions should be graduated
Andthe costs of sanctions should be proportionate to the violation
Scenario Conflict-resolution — accessible mechanisms
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenconflicts among appropriators
Thenlow-cost conflict-resolution mechanisms should be available
Andthe resolution should be rapid and binding
Scenario Recognized rights — nested tiers
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Giventhe commons operates at multiple scales
Thenthe rights of appropriators to devise their own rules
Andrecognized external authorities should respect those rights
Andnested tiers of organization should be permitted
Scenario Polycentric governance — overlapping jurisdictions
Givena Holon Unit operating as a local biome
AndOstrom's 8 principles as the governance foundation
Givenmultiple governance units across village, regional, and global scales
Thenpolycentric governance enables efficient information flow
Andlocalized decision-making for local conditions
Andcoordination across tiers without centralization

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
